# @codenhub/store

> Typed synchronous and asynchronous object stores for browser, Node.js, and
> Cloudflare persistence. The package and its driver contracts are experimental.

Stores clone state and recover from storage failures through initial-state
fallbacks and optional error events. Choose a driver appropriate to the runtime;
only the synchronous browser store has a default driver.

## Documentation

- [Documentation overview](docs/index.md): Scope, stability, entrypoints, and
  navigation.
- [Core stores](docs/core-stores.md): Store methods, validation, concurrency,
  defaults, and failures.
- [Storage drivers](docs/storage-drivers.md): Browser, memory, Node.js, and
  Cloudflare driver behavior.
